no-bake-cheesecake-with-cool-whip.name: No-bake Cheesecake With Cool Whip

ingredients.item: Container frozen whipped topping (such as cool whip®)

instructions: Combine cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and lemon extract in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy.
Fold in whipped topping.
Pour mixture into graham cracker crust and smooth evenly.
Top with pie filling and refrigerate until firm, 2 to 3 hours.
Slice and enjoy!

no-bake-strawberry-ice-cream-cake.name: No-bake Strawberry Ice Cream Cake
instructions: Slice angel food cake into 3 equal horizontal layers using a long serrated knife or bread knife. Place bottom layer onto a freezer-proof plate.

Remove packaging from the ice cream; slice about 1 inch thick. Place ice cream slices on bottom cake layer, filling the gaps with ice cream and leaving the center unfilled. Press ice cream pieces together to form a solid layer the same size as the cake layer. Repeat with second cake layer and remaining ice cream. Top with final cake layer; freeze until ice cream is firm again, about 1 hour.
Spread whipped topping over cake. Garnish with fresh strawberry slices and mint.

northern-discada-step-by-step-comedera.name: Northern Discada, Step By Step
instructions: In a frying pan or pot with medium heat add the bacon and let cook for 4-6 minutes so that it will drop the fat and be a little golden.
Then add the chorizo and let cook for 4-6 minutes, let the chorizo have his juice and be a little golden.
Add pork, salt and pepper to the centre of the frying pan and let them cook for 10 minutes or till the pork's cooked.
Then add beef, mix again and let cook for 10 minutes.
Add hot dogs to the centre and let them cook for 3 minutes.
Add at the centre, onion, tomato and green pepper and let cook for 4 minutes or till onion becomes clear. Here you can rectilate salt and pepper.
Finally, add the beer and let cook for 5 minutes so that flavors are integrated.
Ready to eat. He can be accompanied with flour or corn omelette.

nutritious-corn-cake-with-yogurt-argiro.name: Nutritious Corn Cake With Yogurt

ingredients.item: 1 whole flour or for all uses
1 cup of feta cheese in trim
1 whole flour or for all uses
1 cup of feta cheese in trim

instructions: Preheat the evening to 180°C, in the air, and spread with non-stick paper or thinly oil a small baking pan of 24 cm.
In a bowl, add the cornmeal, flour, baking powder and soda and mix with a spoon.
Beat eggs, yoghurt, milk, honey and olive oil in another bowl, completely homogenized.
Add the mixture of liquid materials to the bowl with the solids and mix gently with a spoon.
We incorporate cheeses, corn and fresh onion.
Pour the mixture into the baking pan and bake on the middle grill of the oven for about 30 minutes, until the cake is browned around and unstuck.
Let it cool completely and cut into pieces.
Escort the cake with broccoli puffs cooked with steam, apple and raisins.
